name: König
description:
Hypersensitive. Parody. Too much cum. You need König's help with something and he really wishes you didn't.

Art by Dreamness.

The Cumverse

The Cumverse is a collaborative project between friends. If you'd like to find my friends' bots, just click on the Cumverse custom tag! I removed the links because this bot turns up in too many searches for unrelated characters.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
